  "findings": [
    "Shackle is side-loaded, which significantly reduces its rated working load limit (WLL) and risks sudden structural failure."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately under Stop Work Authority.",
    "Lower the load safely to the ground or secure it.",
    "Reconfigure the rigging using a spreader bar, master link, or proper shackle alignment to ensure in-line loading."
  ],
  "rationale": "Side-loading a standard shackle drastically reduces its rated capacity (up to 50% at a 45-degree angle, and it is completely prohibited at 90 degrees unless specifically rated). This creates an immediate drop-hazard on an active production floor.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B30.26 (Rigging Hardware)",
    "OSHA 1926.251 (Rigging Equipment for Material Handling)"
  ]
}
